opinion.h2: Robert E. McGRATH, petitioner, v. Guy T. HELVERING, Commissioner of Internal Revenue. No. 309.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Camden R. McAtee, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari of the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit denied.
Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 776, 58 S. Ct. 136, 82 L.Ed. --.[ McGrath v. Helvering (1937) ]
